channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Travelers advised on Europe's new Entry/Exit System
item.description: Experts warn of possible disruptions as the EU and other countries roll out the new Entry/Exit System for travelers.

item.title: Main insights from primary elections in Los Angeles, Iowa and New Jersey
item.description: Key points from the June 2 primary elections.

item.title: Senate advances reconciliation bill, excludes ballroom funding
item.description: Senate Republicans are set to advance a package funding DHS immigration agencies on Wednesday.

item.title: Contentious GOP primary for South Dakota governor heads to runoff
item.description: Businessman Toby Doeden and incumbent Gov. Larry Rhoden will face off in a runoff for the GOP nomination.
